name: Mylan N.V.
description: Mylan N.V. was a prominent global pharmaceutical company specializing in generic and specialty medicines. Headquartered in the Netherlands following a corporate inversion, the company maintained an extensive portfolio of thousands of products, including the well-known EpiPen. Mylan focused on increasing access to high-quality healthcare by providing affordable treatment options to patients in over 165 countries. In November 2020, Mylan N.V. ceased to exist as an independent entity after merging with Upjohn, the off-patent medicine division of Pfizer, to form a new global healthcare company known as Viatris.
